ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)

ingredients_text: 50% raspberry flavoured fromage frais (soft cheese (milk), sugar, whipping cream (milk), 6% raspberry juice from concentrate, modified starch, starch, glucose-fructose syrup, natural flavouring (contains milk), colouring beetroot juice concentrate, thickener: guar gum, riboflavin (vitamin b2)), 50% vanilla flavoured fromage frais (soft cheese (milk), sugar, water, whipping cream (milk), modified starch, glucose-fructose syrup, starch, colouring plant concentrate (carrot), natural vanilla flavouring, thíckener: pectins, guar gum, natural flavouring (contains milk)).
